conditioning_population: Eligible complete submitted checklist by taxon
response_state: detection distinct from X ambiguity and count
exposure_state_required: Recorded-event active/reference and frozen source-point strata
positivity_requirements: Overlap in season region protocol effort observer history habitat and access
geometry_timing_requirements: Validated source-point representation and frozen event timing
current_interpretability: Descriptive association conditional on submitted eligible checklists; not occurrence occupancy or causation
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze small claim hierarchy; matched diagnostics; holdout access control; no response-derived nuisance learning

conditioning_population: Detected taxon with a positive numeric count
response_state: positive numeric only; X and lower bounds separate
exposure_state_required: Recorded-event active/reference and frozen source-point strata
positivity_requirements: Overlap among numeric-report checklists and count availability
geometry_timing_requirements: Same as E01 plus count-family support
current_interpretability: Descriptive conditional reported-count association with visible lognormal versus truncated-NB2 disagreement
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze family arbitration independent of holdout sign and retain all count states

response_state: deterministic zero plus numeric count; X unresolved
exposure_state_required: Recorded-event or surveyed comparison depending design
positivity_requirements: Overlap in checklist submission and exposure classification
geometry_timing_requirements: Registered zero construction and supported geometry
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Define treatment of X and lower bounds; power; multiplicity; prospective lock

target_quantity: Guild reporting and bounded reported count
conditioning_population: Eligible complete checklist by primary guild
response_state: detection richness and positive numeric guild count kept separate
exposure_state_required: Recorded-event active/reference and frozen source-point strata
positivity_requirements: Overlap by guild region effort observer and event block
current_interpretability: Descriptive guild association; positive-count conditioning and one CC support failure visible
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze primary guild contrasts and matched count-family rule before holdout

response_state: registered detection diversity with bounded count sensitivity
positivity_requirements: Community coverage and comparable checklist effort
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Predeclare metric and taxon set; block validation; multiplicity and holdout power

conditioning_population: Eligible checklist by species or guild
exposure_state_required: All concurrent recorded links in frozen time and distance strata
positivity_requirements: Common support across rings phases effort routes and observers
geometry_timing_requirements: Route footprint must match claimed ring resolution; timing representation fixed
current_interpretability: Representation-specific descriptive pattern; fine rings limited for traveling routes
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze model-specific route gate and timing geometry before holdout

target_quantity: Near far and regional allocation or mass balance
response_state: detection count share or regional total
exposure_state_required: Concurrent recorded events and comparison units
positivity_requirements: Overlap in regional checklist allocation and exposure opportunities
geometry_timing_requirements: Movement catchment; regional boundary; simultaneous timing
current_interpretability: Active-near minus contemporaneous-reference association only; not identified regional mass balance
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Predeclare local allocation and regional-total endpoints with interference assumptions

target_quantity: Response gradient across herring intensity components
response_state: detection and count with component missingness separate
exposure_state_required: Recorded source components and method-matched intensity
positivity_requirements: Overlap by component availability method region and effort
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze component-specific model and measurement-error rules before outcome access

geometry_timing_requirements: Blocked event timing and distance support
current_interpretability: Not estimated; residual association would not establish interaction
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze reduced pair set latent structure and validation without holdout leakage

target_quantity: Checklist visitation reporting and count-state processes
conditioning_population: Observed checklist or observer metadata; zero-submission opportunities when available
response_state: visitation count richness reporting and numeric availability
exposure_state_required: Recorded exposure plus explicit choice set where identifiable
positivity_requirements: Observed alternatives and common support in access habitat and survey coverage
geometry_timing_requirements: Spatial choice set and event timing must precede outcome
current_interpretability: M32 and M40 describe observation structure; M26 does not estimate exposure-related visitation
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze selection-process estimand and choice set; DFO coverage where used; no automatic weighting

response_state: seasonal timing and lagged reported response
exposure_state_required: Versioned herring timing and lagged exposure
positivity_requirements: Overlap across years latitudes and seasonal support
geometry_timing_requirements: Start end midpoint interval and availability fixed
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze timing representation and power before holdout

response_state: detection-first composition with count states separate
positivity_requirements: Assemblage and effort overlap with blocked replication
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze one primary community architecture and validation rule before holdout

target_quantity: Deviation under placebo specificity and sensitivity designs
response_state: matched core outcome or specificity detection
exposure_state_required: Outcome-free shifted exposure or fixed specificity panel
positivity_requirements: Matched support within region-year and preserved observation structure
geometry_timing_requirements: Event-specific uncontaminated shifts and matched primary family
current_interpretability: M29 specificity is interpretable as a warning; M27 and M28 results are not conforming diagnostics
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze placebo construction matching and decision rules before holdout

conditioning_population: Held-out event block or prospective holdout
current_interpretability: Development prediction metrics are usable with disclosed fixed-factor exclusions; prospective claim unavailable
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Power; immutable package; one-shot access; no interim looks; independent or audited release mechanism

target_quantity: Spatial concentration and upper-tail flock reporting
conditioning_population: Eligible checklist by taxon or guild
geometry_timing_requirements: Route-compatible distance and frozen threshold period
prospective_confirmation_requirements: Freeze thresholds from development period without holdout access and validate power
